login.title: Sign In

errors.generic: Unable to sign in. Please try again.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Your Password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter the email address linked to your account, and we'll send you a link to reset your password.

updatePassword.title: Set a New Password
updatePassword.subtitle: Your OTP has been verified. Please create a strong new password to secure your account.

twoStep.title: Two Step Verification
twoStep.subtitle: A verification code has been sent to your email. Please enter it in the field below.
